meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Scale Fast
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale your freelance projects. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate delivery and increase output.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves scaling bottlenecks by standardizing your architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and boilerplate code. By pairing it with Claude Code, you can transform high-level requirements into production-ready features in minutes, allowing you to handle multiple high-value client projects simultaneously without sacrificing quality or your personal time.
content.intro:
You wake up to a inbox full of feature requests, but your current codebase feels like a house of cards. Every new client project starts from scratch, leading to 'code drift' and massive technical debt that grinds your growth to a halt. The freelance trap is real: the more you succeed, the less time you have to actually build.

There is a better way. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you move from artisan coding to industrial-grade production. This isn't just about speed; it's about building a repeatable, scalable engine that allows you to deliver enterprise-level software while you sleep.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a standardized project structure that enforces clean architecture from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with TypeScript, Postgres, and Next.js, including a pre-configured modular directory structure.

steps.title: Configure Business Logic Domains
steps.description: Define your domain-driven design (DDD) boundaries to prevent monolithic spaghetti code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new domain module for 'UserSubscription' including schema, service layer, and API routes based on the Antigravity pattern.

steps.title: Inject Automated Testing Hooks
steps.description: Ensure every feature is self-validating, reducing manual QA time by 80%.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add automated integration tests for the newly created domain module using the built-in Antigravity testing utility.

steps.title: Implement Production CI/CD Pipelines
steps.description: Automate your deployment lifecycle so you can focus on building, not devops.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow that follows the Antigravity production-ready CI/CD template.

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy
steps.description: Run the final health check and sync with your remote repository for immediate delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the Antigravity health check script and summarize all endpoints for client documentation.

pro_tips: Always use Antigravity's 'Feature Flag' toggle in the config to deploy code without exposing it to production users immediately.
Use Claude Code's '--watch' mode during local development to automatically trigger linting and type-checking on every save.
Standardize your environment variables using the Antigravity .env.example pattern to avoid 'it works on my machine' bugs.
Treat your project template as a living repository; commit improvements to your base template every time you finish a client project.
Leverage the modular architecture to swap out database providers without touching your core service logic.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin by migrating your smallest active project into the Antigravity template to test the workflow, then systematically roll it out to your larger accounts.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your own tools and start shipping at the speed of thought. By implementing this architecture, you'll reclaim 20 hours of your week and double your project throughput. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
